markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Tristan Peters records 5+ total hits + runs + rbis in the Chicago WS vs Cleveland professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 2, 2026 at 6:40 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Tristan Peters is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Tristan Peters starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Tristan Peters is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Tristan Peters is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.
markets.title: Tristan Peters: 5+ hits + runs + RBIs?
